textByHashes.6c1fbbe4958611ef8b5f7b5623dc9c840503a32a: Of course Madam. There are two different weights of shot...
textByHashes.a4811d54d130678ca2f0c02942966cb6c4ac3c7e: Of course Sir. There are two different weights of shot...
textByHashes.9037a00ed5709559ddfbf53fca5b6b990ab4267a: Yes Madam. Shot. The iron spheres that are propelled by the chemical energy stored in your body.
textByHashes.cc55071028bc3be2f85667d5e4ca1482cf5b2dbb: Yes Sir. Shot. The iron spheres that are propelled by the chemical energy stored in your body.
textByHashes.3ab9ebfde1d30c9598e232562533334664002b8e: Your strength Madam. The stronger you are, the further you can throw the shot, but there are other factors of course, like your technique.
textByHashes.c6494a6d84b5284e79f0ac5ef4947a0abe557af1: Your strength Sir. The stronger you are, the further you can throw the shot, but there are other factors of course, like your technique.
textByHashes.a6c8cd6e7d56a8ef8043cb07fe8ef4bbbfbb6594: The style of the shot Madam.
textByHashes.0d651da0c23f0ce1e35fca07d71bf3a387392d09: The style of the shot Sir.
textByHashes.4d463b8581760822f00930f320b95f9fdf7cc09c: Madam, the style in which you throw the shot, not the style of the iron.
textByHashes.306017bda5d5ab66e4ff3c2cccef5792e4297971: Sir, the style in which you throw the shot, not the style of the iron.
textByHashes.a47a4433a580deadc98c7d8b315e72ff2061d616: Crudely put Madam, but yes. Some are more difficult than others. Experiment and see which you prefer.
textByHashes.f6b73de340f032ec59bead5edd7d65a98404ca11: Crudely put Sir, but yes. Some are more difficult than others. Experiment and see which you prefer.
textByHashes.581132a0564fdab3ad489dc0d34c562d75f1261a: Of course! Here you go, you've earned tokens!
textByHashes.52fd98415f8b7e20fa0cbce6fdb6e3b9c29a8032: You don't have space to carry them.
textByHashes.2a5bac8ece19398591cdd940c3ea1dbf879868c6: I'm afraid you have not earned any tokens yet. Try some of the activities around the guild to earn some.
textByHashes.2979620c5beb0ea4570405d2229fd18de2fab626: Madam may find that a fine powder applied to the hands may give one an advantage when putting the shot.
textByHashes.d483214ee79a928733e40a50c4b99da25c531c40: Sir may find that a fine powder applied to the hands may give one an advantage when putting the shot.
textByHashes.29d218b4bb46c735549a49bd415006b3363ce78a: Oi! Watch where you're throwing that !
